title: Built Two Unicorns in 12 Years. The Rule Has Never Changed | Glean, Arvind Jain
summary: Arvind Jain founded Glean, now valued at $7 billion, after previously building another unicorn. His approach focused on identifying unmet enterprise information retrieval needs within his team rather than competing directly in crowded markets. The core principle emphasizes focus and selective scope over pursuing every opportunity.
